The German computer repair technician who may have inspired *Diary of a Cannibal* is **Armin Meiwes**. 

This is supported by the context, which states that Meiwes is known as the "Rotenburg Cannibal" and that his true-crime story was possibly inspired by the events in the film *Diary of a Cannibal*. The film is also mentioned as being inspired by the true-crime story of Armin Meiwes.
